title: Compensation of justices of the peace for performing marriage ceremonies
doc_html:
§2588.  Compensation of justices of the peace for performing marriage ceremonies

A justice of the peace who performs a marriage ceremony may charge a usual and customary fee for that service.

Acts 2004, No. 824, §1, eff. July 12, 2004.
doc_text:
§2588.  Compensation of justices of the peace for performing marriage ceremonies

Acts 2004, No. 824, §1, eff. July 12, 2004.
